competitions.title: Azra Sari vs Egle Vaitkute at EVW 23
I Pulled 4 Classes With A 100 Lb Band | Arkansas State Championships
competitions.summary:
I competed in the Arkansas State Armwrestling Championships… but I didn’t want it to be easy. I wanted to put in some good work. 
So I pulled 4 classes...with a 100lb resistance band on every single match.
Every opponent. Regardless of how seasoned they were. Regardless of how strong...
I wanted real work on go and throughout the match… I got it.
By the midway point, my arm was already toast.

This wasn’t about taking easy wins. This was about pushing through fatigue, pressure, and finding out where I’m really at right now.
Sometimes you have to make it harder on yourself… just to get better.

Let me know—would you try something like this?
